description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The front features a covered porch supported by columns, a driveway with a parked car, and a garage attached to the side. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The backyard includes a wooden deck, a small swimming pool, outdoor furniture, and landscaped greenery. Several trees and shrubs are positioned around the property, enhancing its suburban appeal. The exterior is finished in light neutral tones with subtle brick and wood accents.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a landscaped yard with a pool and deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway with car, garage, and two trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and backyard with pool, deck, and outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard deck, swimming pool, patio furniture, and large windows facing the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open backyard, pool, deck, and the driveway with car on the far side.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, single main door, steps, and minimal decorative elements
